status: PRODUCTION READY - Ralph Iteration 37: Family Profile System & Bug Fixes
summary: Ralph Iteration 37 - Family Profile System & Bug Fixes: Activated 3 previously orphaned components (FamilyProfileManager, PersonalizedRecommendations) into the main app. Fixed GoNowSuggestions prop mismatch bug (onNavigate now correctly passes name parameter). Fixed analytics production deployment - uncommented the fetch call to actually send analytics data to /api/analytics/events endpoint in production. Fixed errorTracking.ts typo (byServerity → bySeverity) and updated corresponding test. Added 2 new server_node test files for LocationController and FavoriteController 500 error paths. Fixed server_node vitest configuration by creating vitest.config.mjs to bypass package resolution issues. All 614 tests passing (477 client + 64 server_node + 73 Python). Zero TypeScript errors. Production build successful (42.52 kB gzipped).
boss_feedback_addressed: Activated previously built-but-orphaned features: FamilyProfileManager now accessible via Users icon in header, allowing families to save profiles with children's ages, special needs, and preferences. PersonalizedRecommendations now shows in sidebar when no search is active, learning from user behavior to recommend the most relevant venues. Fixed 3 bugs: GoNowSuggestions prop mismatch, analytics data not being sent in production, and errorTracking typo. Added more server test coverage (6 new tests for error paths). Total test count grew from 550 to 614.
features_activated: FamilyProfileManager - Users icon in header, modal for managing family profiles with children ages/special needs
PersonalizedRecommendations - Sidebar section showing ML-scored venue recommendations when no search is active
Analytics production mode - fetch call re-enabled to send event data to /api/analytics/events
bugs_fixed: GoNowSuggestions prop mismatch - onNavigate now correctly receives (lat, lng, name) not (lat, lng)
Analytics dead in production - fetch call was commented out, now properly sends data with error handling
errorTracking.ts typo - byServerity → bySeverity (and fixed matching test)
